title: 8 Herbal Teas For Bad Taste
description: Mentha x piperita teas contains menthol, menthone, and limonene, which are the key compounds that help with bad taste. These properties work by killing bacteria and germs in the mouth, reducing the bacteria's ability to produce foul-smelling compounds that cause bad breath. Additionally, menthol has a numbing effect, which can help to reduce the sensation of pain and discomfort in the mouth and throat.
